creator: ohartman@mail.zedat.fu-berlin.de
text:
On 01/26/12 10:08, Yuri wrote:
> I think google earth 6.1.0.5001,1 works fine now on 9.0 amd64.
> I just installed it on installed from scratch dependency packages, and
> it works actually faster than on 8.2 on the same hardware and didn't crash.
> 
> Yuri
